title: Changing Recurring Timelines with Automations
excerpt: Hello, I was wondering if there is an automation I can use to change the date of a recurring timeline after X number of days. For context, my team has a recurring task that needs to be done every Tuesday. We would like t…

posts.author: jguzman (Jessica Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, I was wondering if there is an automation I can use to change the date of a recurring timeline after X number of days. For context, my team has a recurring task that needs to be done every Tuesday. We would like the timeline to be adjusted to reflect the next week’s dates either after a status change or on Mondays. For all other tasks on our board we use the timeline function, so I’m not sure if that complicates things.

posts.author: HPETRIE (Hannah Petrie)
posts.cookedHtml: @jguzman Has this been answered? Looking to solve a similar question on my end.
